< Home >

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LightBulletins.LightBulletinTimePeriod

Provides filtering bulletins by time period.

Possible enumeration values:

NameValueDescription
Current

0

Only current bulletins should be returned.
Expired

1

Only expired bulletins should be returned.
Scheduled

2

Only ongoing bulletins should be returned.
All

3

No filtering by time period.
